## prompt-final-bill

> Filed verbatim from `auto-bill-01/sub-prompts/prompt-7-final-bill.md` (the sub-prompt that generated this stage), per the prior repository's prompt convention (Rule 14).


*Generated by Process A from `cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill` and the human corrections previously made from draft-bill to full-bill, adapted for the single-prompt v4.0 build (repository release v1.0.0).*

Produce the polished, final H. R. 9510 Bill v4.0 LaTeX and zip into
`auto-bill-01/final-bill`, so its context and formatting quality match and exceed
`cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill`. Start from `auto-bill-01/full-bill` and
apply the corrections a senior human author would make, learning from the
improvements visible between the prior draft-bill, full-bill, and final-bill: tune
the reference (bibliography) appearance with correct white-space formatting so no
line ends with a single stranded word; balance every page with `\clearpage`,
`\vspace`, and `\hspace`; confirm every table column width uses
`>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{<width>}` at the body measure; verify single
hyphens only and the section symbol § for every codified reference; and confirm the
clickable, page-filling table of contents lists all four operative sections and all
twelve deliverable appendices (Rules 2, 3).

Carry all twelve deliverable appendices in their improved, updated, final LaTeX
form (Appendix A through Appendix L), each a faithful, submission-quality
conversion of its source in
`cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill/deliverables`, each with its own
gray-scale Mermaid (TikZ) figure where a figure aids the reader, and each in the
table of contents. Include the "Authorship, Notices, and Provenance" block and the
References back matter, both correct. No images, only gray-scale Mermaid diagrams;
white background throughout.

One commit each for `main.tex`, `usctitle.sty`, `references.bib`, and `README.md`;
one commit per `sections/*.tex`; one commit per deliverable appendix `.tex`. For
the second-to-last commit, fix all errors across all files. For the last commit,
write the directory README and the `final-bill-LaTeX.zip` Overleaf bundle. All
commits belong to a single pull request, and this stage marks repository release
v1.0.0.

Create `auto-bill-01/final-bill/prompt-final-bill.md` (this prompt verbatim under
a `## prompt-final-bill` heading) and `output-final-bill.md` (the narrative
output). After this stage, perform the single last update (Rule 10): add
`CHANGELOG.md` and `releases.md` at the repository root (v1.0.0) and finalize the
repository documentation. Use only Claude Code Opus 4.8 (1M context) Max. Do not
stall, ask questions, or go into plan mode. The LaTeX must compile in Overleaf with
pdfLaTeX.
